colors.principle: Soft, expansive pastel gradients with high-contrast dark typography and a single vibrant blue accent.

spacing.rhythm: generous whitespace to emphasize scale and openness

layout.skeleton: full-screen, immersive hero with central content and floating elements

colors.principle: High-contrast neutrals with a single, vibrant action color.

spacing.rhythm: Standard 4px grid system

layout.skeleton: A standard grid layout with a prominent search bar at the top, followed by horizontal scrollable carousels of image-rich cards.

colors.principle: Minimalist, neutral palette that lets user data and content stand out.

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 4px-based spacing scale for predictable vertical and horizontal rhythm.

surfaces.borders: Subtle, light grey borders for minimal separation.

layout.skeleton: Clean, centered content structure.

colors.principle: High-contrast ink on pure white with a single vibrant blue primary action color

rules: Tight line heights and negative tracking for display text
Clear visual hierarchy through weight and size

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 4px base grid with generous vertical padding

layout.skeleton: Centered single-column layout with a prominent full-width hero

colors.principle: 纯黑 #000000 占据 90%+ 画面，所有文字靠白色梯度层级区分，蓝色 #2997FF 仅用于可交互元素

scale.use: 产品名主标题如 iPhone 17 Pro
副标题如 All out Pro.
按钮内文字 Learn more / Buy

rules: 产品名标题 600 weight 非 700+，保持克制而非粗暴加粗
副标题 400 weight 细于标题形成明确层级差
nav 文字极小约 12-13px 灰色低调不抢视觉焦点
所有文字严格水平垂直居中对齐

spacing.rhythm: 慷慨 —— section 间上下 padding 约 80-120px，产品图与文字间距约 24-32px，呼吸感极大

shadows: 几乎无阴影 —— 全黑背景上靠产品摄影自身光影建层次
surfaces.borders: 仅按钮描边用 1px semi-transparent white/blue，无卡片边框无分割线

layout.skeleton: fixed semi-transparent nav → hero 产品名+副标题+双按钮+满幅产品摄影 → 重复同样结构的第二 section(MacBook Pro) → 继续堆叠

patterns: nav 背景 blur 半透明暗示滚动时 fixed 定位
产品图可能随滚动有微妙视差或 fade-in 但静态无法确认

colors.principle: Clean white canvas with a bold, primary violet accent and expressive, high-chroma gradient hero.

rules: Use dark ink on light backgrounds.
Display type uses tight tracking and heavy weight for maximum impact.
Avoid pure black; stick to deep navy or slate for body copy.

spacing.rhythm: 8px base grid for consistent spacing.

surfaces.borders: Subtle 1px borders to define surfaces without heavy shadows.

layout.skeleton: Centered, constrained container with generous whitespace.

colors.principle: High-contrast, black-on-white with a single vibrant green accent for primary actions.

rules: Headlines are set in a geometric sans-serif with tight letter-spacing.
Body text uses a clean, readable humanist sans-serif.
Weight contrast is moderate, using 400 and 500 primarily.

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 8px-based spacing system with generous whitespace for clarity.

layout.skeleton: Centered single-column layout with a max-width container for main content.

patterns: Subtle hover state transitions on buttons and navigation.

colors.principle: Deep, dark backgrounds create focus and a premium feel, with white text for clarity and a subtle purple accent for interactive elements.

spacing.rhythm: A consistent 4px base grid with a harmonious scale for vertical rhythm and spacing.

surfaces.borders: Subtle 1px borders using rgba(255,255,255,0.1) for definition without distraction.

layout.skeleton: A centered, single-column layout for the hero, transitioning to a complex, layered composition with overlapping cards and imagery.

colors.principle: Stark black-and-white contrast to let product imagery dominate

rules: Tight letter-spacing on large display text
Consistent geometric sans-serif throughout

spacing.rhythm: 8px baseline grid with generous vertical whitespace

surfaces.borders: Minimal, mostly borderless design with subtle separators

layout.skeleton: Full-bleed hero images with centered content blocks

colors.principle: High-contrast monochrome palette with sharp typographic hierarchy.

rules: Display font uses tight leading for maximum impact.
Body font prioritizes readability with standard line height.
Muted text for secondary information like timestamps.
Bold weights used for headlines and emphasis.

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 4px grid with generous whitespace around major content blocks.

layout.skeleton: Main content area with large featured article on left and secondary feed on right.

patterns: Smooth hover transitions on interactive elements.
No distracting animations, focus on content clarity.

colors.principle: Clean, neutral palette with a single deep blue accent for brand identity

rules: Use geometric sans-serif for all primary text
Maintain tight letter spacing for display text
Use monospace for code snippets and technical references

spacing.rhythm: 8px baseline grid for consistent vertical spacing

layout.skeleton: Single column centered layout with generous whitespace

patterns: Smooth hover states on interactive elements

colors.principle: Strict monochrome utility with high contrast for readability and action.

spacing.rhythm: Generous vertical spacing between sections to maintain a clean, uncluttered feel.

surfaces.borders: Subtle 1px borders for input fields and container separation.

layout.skeleton: Asymmetric two-column hero layout transitioning to a grid of cards.

colors.principle: Monochrome primary palette with high contrast, using chromatic color only within a single decorative graphic element.

rules: Headlines use tight negative letter-spacing for a compact, bold feel.
Body text uses generous line-height for readability.
Strong hierarchy established through significant weight and size differences.

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 8px grid system with clear vertical and horizontal rhythm.

surfaces.borders: Light, single-pixel lines in rgba(0,0,0,0.1) or #E5E5E5 for structure.

layout.skeleton: Centered, single-column hero with fluid container, followed by structured content sections.

patterns: Smooth color transitions on interactive elements

colors.principle: High-contrast, ultra-restrained palette with a single corporate blue accent.

rules: Brand text uses a monospaced typeface.
Body copy uses a humanist sans-serif.

spacing.rhythm: Generous whitespace centering the primary elements.

layout.skeleton: Centered content with a vertical stack for the icon and brand name.

colors.principle: Strict monochromatic palette with high contrast between black text and white background

rules: Use bold weight for headlines
Maintain consistent sans-serif typography throughout
Use monospace for code-related content

spacing.rhythm: consistent 4px base grid

layout.skeleton: clean centered layout with ample white space

colors.principle: High-contrast dark mode for focus, with monochromatic scales and subtle borders.

rules: Use tight letter spacing for large display text.
Maintain clear typographic hierarchy with weight and size contrast.
Use a geometric sans-serif for a modern, technical feel.

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 4px base grid for predictable vertical and horizontal spacing.

surfaces.borders: Subtle, low-contrast borders (rgba(255,255,255,0.1)) define card and component edges.

layout.skeleton: Centered content with a max-width container, two-column card grid in the hero section.

patterns: Subtle hover state transitions on buttons and links.

surfaces.borders: Subtle light gray lines for separation.

patterns: Fade-ins, slide-ins, and smooth scrolling for carousel transitions.

colors.principle: High-contrast editorial clarity with photographic vibrancy

spacing.rhythm: Consistent 4px grid with generous whitespace for readability

layout.skeleton: Two-column editorial grid with dominant article and sidebar list

colors.principle: High contrast between a vibrant green background and deep dark text for maximum legibility and energy.

rules: Headlines are bold, uppercase, and set in a geometric sans-serif with tight tracking.
Body text is a highly legible humanist sans-serif.
Numerical values in the calculator use a distinct, heavy geometric weight.

patterns: Subtle hover effects on interactive elements.

rules: All-caps navigation with wide letter-spacing
Display text uses very tight letter-spacing at massive scales
Body text is clean, geometric, and highly legible

spacing.rhythm: Generous vertical spacing creates a sense of vast, open space, emphasizing the central elements.

shadows: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1) for input and button borders
No drop shadows, maintaining a flat, planar aesthetic

patterns: Subtle fade-ins for content, smooth hover transitions on buttons

rules: Headlines use tight letter-spacing and semi-bold weight
Body text uses regular weight with comfortable line-height
Small labels use uppercase tracking for hierarchy
